choke_down.name: Choke Down

punch.description: Low punch shot under trees. -25% distance.

shotShape.infoText: We automatically adjust for your curve on every club - more for driver, less for wedges.

target.title: Choose Your View
target.subtitle: Drag the overlay to aim. See your shot as a target or dispersion ellipse.
target.ellipseModeText: Your dispersion pattern shows where your shots actually land based on your handicap. The optimizer uses this to find the
target.targetModeText: Simple crosshair shows your exact aim point. Great for precise distance tracking, but doesn't show your shot dispersion.

hole.title: Hole Information
hole.description: Shows current hole number and par. Tap to see the scorecard.

distance.title: Distance to Pin
distance.description: Live GPS distance to the pin, updated as you move.

wind.title: Wind Conditions
wind.description: Real-time wind speed and direction affecting your shot.

elevation.title: Elevation Change
elevation.description: How much uphill or downhill to the green - plays longer/shorter.

target.title: Dispersion Ellipse
target.description: Your shot pattern based on handicap. Drag to adjust aim point.

optimizer.title: Club Optimizer
optimizer.description: AI-recommended clubs based on distance, wind, and hazards.

voice.title: AI Caddy
voice.description: Tap to ask your AI caddy for advice using natural speech.

pinside.title: Pin Side
pinside.description: Set the pin position to left, middle, or right. Adjusts aim point on the map and in shot recommendations.

score.title: Score Entry

welcome.title: Welcome to Copperline Golf
welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent golf companion
welcome.description: Complete a quick 8-step interactive tour to get personalized recommendations for every shot on the course.

apiKey.title: API Key Setup
apiKey.subtitle: Configure your API keys to unlock all features
apiKey.openAiDesc: Required for Whisper speech-to-text (optional - device recognition works without this)
apiKey.getOpenAiSteps:
1. Go to platform.openai.com
2. Sign in or create account
3. Navigate to API Keys section
4. Create new secret key
apiKey.getAnthropicSteps:
1. Go to console.anthropic.com
2. Sign in or create account
3. Navigate to API Keys section
4. Create new API key
apiKey.secureNote: Your API keys are stored securely on your device and never sent to any server except OpenAI/Anthropic.
apiKey.skipMsg: Some features may not work without API keys. Continue anyway?
apiKey.noKeysMsg: Please enter at least one API key to continue.
apiKey.saveErrorMsg: Failed to save API keys. Please try again.

errors.selectPlanBody: Please select a subscription plan to continue.

backupScreen.title: Backup & Restore
backupScreen.helpText: Each save automatically backs up the previous version. Up to 20 versions are kept per list. Restoring also creates a backup, so any restore is reversible.
backupScreen.emptyText: No {{tab}} backups yet. Backups are created automatically the next time you save.
backupScreen.confirmClubsMsg:
This will replace your current bag with this {{count}}-club version from {{date}}.

Your current bag will be saved as a new backup first, so you can undo this if you change your mind.
backupScreen.confirmShotsMsg:
This will replace your shots with this {{count}}-shot version from {{date}}.

Your current shots will be saved as a new backup first.

appFeatures.restartOnboardingSubtitle: Review the app tutorial and update your profile

deleteAccount.hint: Permanently removes your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all golf data — rounds, clubs, shots, preferences, and handicap history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.reauthMessage: For security, please sign out and sign back in, then try deleting your account again. Your data has already been removed.
deleteAccount.failedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support@copperlinegolf.com.

signOutDialog.title: Sign Out
signOutDialog.message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
signOutDialog.fallbackMessage: Please restart the app to complete sign out.

clearDataDialog.title: Clear All Data
clearDataDialog.message: This will delete all your profile data, club distances, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
clearDataDialog.successMessage: All app data has been cleared

restartOnboardingDialog.title: Restart Onboarding
restartOnboardingDialog.message: This will take you through the app tutorial again. Your profile data will be preserved.
restartOnboardingDialog.errorMessage: Failed to restart onboarding. Please try again.

skillLevel.title: AI Skill Level
skillLevel.question: How detailed should AI questions be?
skillLevel.label: Skill Level
skillLevel.helpBeginner: Instant recommendations with no questions asked.
skillLevel.helpIntermediate: AI asks about lie and wind conditions.
skillLevel.helpAdvanced: AI asks about lie, wind, elevation, and temperature.
skillLevel.helpPro: AI asks detailed questions including stance and shot shape.
skillLevel.helpTourPro: Full pro-level analysis with all factors considered.

verbosity.title: AI Verbosity
verbosity.label: Verbosity
verbosity.helpTalkItThrough: Full conversation - AI reads all data and asks questions
verbosity.helpMinimal: Quick flow - AI only asks for lie and stance
verbosity.helpJustFacts: You speak first - tell me lie and stance

ai.footer: AI settings help customize recommendations to match your playing style and skill level. Changes take effect immediately.

tournament-dmd.label: Tournament (DMD)
tournament-dmd.description: GPS distance only - USGA Rule 4.3 compliant

tournament-no-dmd.label: Tournament (No DMD)
tournament-no-dmd.description: No electronic aids - Local Rule G-5

meta.title: Contact Us | Copperline Golf - Get in Touch
meta.description: Contact Copperline Golf support team. Get help with your golf caddy app, send feedback, or inquire about our AI-powered golf recommendations.

hero.subtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Our team is here to help you get the most out of Copperline Golf.

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.subheading: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
form.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again or email us directly.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.subjectTooShort: Subject must be at least 3 characters
errors.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters

hours.heading: Office Hours
hours.responseNote: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.

social.heading: Connect With Us
social.body: Follow us on social media for the latest updates, tips, and golf insights.

faq.heading: Need Quick Answers?
faq.body: Check out our Help Center for instant answers to common questions.

features.smartClubDesc: AI-powered recommendations based on your unique swing profile and real-time conditions. Get the right club for every shot.
features.profileDesc: Track your clubs and distances with personalized insights for every club in your bag. Your game, optimized.
features.conditionsDesc: Live weather, wind, and elevation data for every shot. Make informed decisions based on actual conditions.
features.sectionSubtitle: Three core features that work together to transform your game

aiCta.heading: Try AI Powered Club Selection
aiCta.body: Experience our intelligent voice assistant that helps you choose the perfect club for any shot. Select your skill level and describe your shot to get instant, personalized recommendations.

stats.subtitle: Join thousands of players who have improved their game with Copperline Golf

howItWorks.step1Desc: Answer a few quick questions about your game and add your club distances.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Open Copperline Golf on your phone and let it track conditions automatically.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive instant, personalized club recommendations for every shot.

testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from golfers who have transformed their game
